notes: Output reduces the input photo to three disconnected mantle outlines with no heads, arms or tentacles, and fills the interior with noisy edge fragments rather than disciplined FAO stipple.
specific_issues: arms and tentacles entirely missing — only mantle/fin outlines drawn
wrong squid count (photo shows 4 whole squid; output shows 3 mantle shapes)
no head, no funnel, no neck region rendered
eyes reduced to a couple of stray filled blobs not placed on heads
interior is noisy edge-trace clutter, not sparse chromatophore stipple
silhouette broken in multiple places (gaps along mantle edges)
no ring suckers, no almond eyes, no fin separation lines
reads as a photo edge-detect artifact rather than an FAO scientific plate
